title: Medici Origin — The Ice Choir Resonance
description: Aerasi of the Choir has agreed to demonstrate the Medici Ice Choir's resonance to a non-Medici. The demonstration is unprecedented. Whatever you witness, the Medici will know you witnessed.

objectives.description: Travel to the Medici Ward in Kree
Notice the star-chart embedded in the resonance pattern

title: Medici Origin — Where the Charts Match
description: The star-chart you witnessed in the Choir's resonance matches a fragment from the Asbir deletion index. Both point to the same star — a star not visible from Tunya without specific atmospheric conditions. Find a Tunyan night when the star is visible, then prove the match.

objectives.description: Wait for a clear-sky night with the right atmospheric layer
Plot the star against both the Asbir deletion index and the Choir resonance pattern
Decide: confront Aerasi privately, publish to all kingdoms, share with Kree chancellor, or keep silent

branch_consequences.confront_aerasi: Aerasi confirms. She tells you the route opens in Year 5G. The Medici remember you forever. Medici+50.
branch_consequences.publish_to_all: The Medici become a planet-wide subject of curiosity, fear, and political negotiation. Reputation -20 with Medici, +15 with Sahm and Bahiij.
branch_consequences.share_with_kree: The Kree chancellor does what a Kree chancellor does. The Medici may or may not survive. You will not know which until Year 5G arrives.
branch_consequences.keep_silent: The truth stays with Aerasi and you. The Choir continues its work. Concord_alignment -0.05 (you held back from a substrate truth).

cross_world_unlocks.effect: the Voss Estate Mirror flickers with cold light for the first time in two centuries
